mapper.select: SELECT b.bno, b.title, b.content, b.writer, b.regdate, b.viewcnt, b.likecnt, b.dislikecnt, b.replycnt, b.cat_id, m.user_img, c.cat_name, c.parent_id AS group_id, NVL(p.cat_name, c.cat_name) AS group_name FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON b.writer = m.userid LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id LEFT JOIN tbl_category p ON c.parent_id = p.cat_id WHERE b.bno > 0 ORDER BY b.bno DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board (bno, title, content, writer, cat_id) VALUES (seq_board.nextval, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{cat_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.user_img, c.cat_name, c.cat_slug FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON b.writer = m.userid LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id WHERE b.bno = #{bno}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_like WHERE bno = #{bno} AND userid = #{userid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_like (lno, bno, userid) VALUES (seq_like.nextval, #{bno}, #{userid})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_like WHERE bno = #{bno} AND userid = #{userid}
mapper.update: update tbl_board set dislikecnt = dislikecnt + #{amount} where bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board_like WHERE bno = #{bno} AND userid = #{userid} AND type = #{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board_like (lno, bno, userid, type) VALUES (seq_board_like.nextval, #{bno}, #{userid}, #{type})
mapper.update: update tbl_board set replycnt = replycnt + #{amount} where bno = #{bno}
mapper.insert:
select seq_board.nextval from dual
insert into tbl_board (bno, title, content, writer, cat_id) values (#{bno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cat_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, c.cat_name FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id WHERE b.cat_id = 11 ORDER BY b.bno DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.BNO, b.TITLE, b.CONTENT, b.WRITER, b.REGDATE, b.LIKECNT, b.REPLYCNT, c.CAT_NAME FROM TBL_BOARD b LEFT JOIN TBL_CATEGORY c ON b.CAT_ID = c.CAT_ID WHERE b.CAT_ID IN (21, 22, 23, 24, 25) ORDER BY b.REGDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 6

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, c.CAT_NAME,
((b.LIKECNT + b.REPLYCNT) * 10 + (b.VIEWCNT * 0.1)) as sort_score
((b.LIKECNT + b.REPLYCNT) * 5 + (b.VIEWCNT * 0.5)) as sort_score
(b.LIKECNT + b.REPLYCNT + b.VIEWCNT) as sort_score
FROM TBL_BOARD b LEFT JOIN TBL_CATEGORY c ON b.CAT_ID = c.CAT_ID
b.cat_id = '81' b.REGDATE >= SYSDATE - 365
ORDER BY
b.bno DESC CASE WHEN b.REGDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sort_score DESC
sort_score DESC, b.REGDATE DESC
) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, c.cat_name, (b.likecnt + b.replycnt) as hot_score FROM tbl_board b LEFT JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id
b.regdate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 2
b.regdate >= SYSDATE - 7
b.regdate >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1)
b.regdate >= SYSDATE - 365
ORDER BY hot_score DESC, b.viewcnt DESC, b.regdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(tbl_board pk_board) */ rownum rn, b.bno, b.title, b.content, b.writer, b.regdate, b.replycnt, b.likecnt, c.cat_name, m.user_img FROM tbl_board b JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON b.writer = m.userid WHERE c.parent_id = (SELECT cat_id FROM tbl_category WHERE cat_slug = #{parentSlug} AND parent_id IS NULL) AND rownum <= #{cri.pageNum} * #{cri.amount} ) WHERE rn > (#{cri.pageNum} - 1) * #{cri.amount}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.bno, b.title, b.content, b.writer, b.regdate, c.cat_name, m.user_img FROM tbl_board b JOIN tbl_category c ON b.cat_id = c.cat_id LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON b.writer = m.userid WHERE c.parent_id = 20 ORDER BY b.regdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 21
SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_board WHERE bno > 0

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_board
cat_id = #{category}
title like '%'||#{cri.keyword}||'%'
content like '%'||#{cri.keyword}||'%'
writer like '%'||#{cri.keyword}||'%'
